# Sunnydevstory
> Sunnydevstory is the official landing page for a Korean solo developer brand building AI-enabled Android apps and web communities.

## Main Pages
- [Home](https://sunnydevstory.netlify.app/): Official landing page for Sunnydevstory.
- [About](https://sunnydevstory.netlify.app/#about): Overview of the developer brand, focus areas, and core capabilities.
- [Projects](https://sunnydevstory.netlify.app/#projects): Featured products including Everydiary and GOOTE.
- [Vision](https://sunnydevstory.netlify.app/#vision): Product philosophy and long-term direction.
- [FAQ](https://sunnydevstory.netlify.app/#faq): Direct answers about the brand and projects.
- [Contact](https://sunnydevstory.netlify.app/#contact): Email, Google Play, and GitHub links.

## Products & Services
- [Everydiary](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.everydiary.lite&hl=ko): Android diary app that turns journal entries into AI-generated images.
- [GOOTE](https://goote-f48d8.web.app/): Web community for Google Play developers to exchange testing feedback.

## Key Facts
- Sunnydevstory builds Android apps, web services, and AI-assisted product experiences.
- The site highlights live products, collaboration intent, and official identity links.
- Primary language: Korean.

## Contact
- Website: https://sunnydevstory.netlify.app/
- Email: window98se@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/guyster323
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/developer?id=Sunnydevstory
